description: Verify the completed Phase 2 by checking its plan and summary against the actual codebase
prompt: Verify Phase 2 (Core Feature). Read @.planning/phases/02-core-feature/02-01-PLAN.md, @.planning/phases/02-core-feature/02-01-SUMMARY.md, @src/utils.js, and @.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md. Check: Are FEAT-01 and FEAT-02 actually implemented? Does the code match what the summary claims? Output a verification report with pass/fail per requirement and an overall status.
